data_maps_Route109_text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_BrineyLandedInSlateport: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nWe've made land in SLATEPORT!\pI suppose you're going to visit CAPT.\nSTERN and deliver the DEVON GOODS?
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E0F9: MR. BRINEY: Aren't you delivering the\nDEVON GOODS?\pOr were you meaning to sail back to\nDEWFORD?
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E159: MR. BRINEY: DEWFORD it is, then!\pAnchors aweigh!\nPEEKO, we're setting sail, my darling!
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E1B1: MR. BRINEY: Then you go on and deliver\nthe DEVON GOODS. I'll be waiting.
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.DewfordTown_Text_BrineyLandedInSlateport: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy! We've made land in\nSLATEPORT!\pYou just go on and tell me whenever\nyou want to set sail again!
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E26A: MR. BRINEY: Ahoy!\nFor you, I'll go out to sea anytime!\pNow, my friend, where are we bound?
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E2C5: MR. BRINEY: You just tell me whenever\nyou need to set sail again!
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E307: Yo, TRAINERS!\nWhether you're hot to trot,\lor cool cat not,\lchill at my papa's spot!
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E35B: Little kids can dart around so quickly...\pYou don't dare take your eyes off them\nfor an instant. It's very taxing.\pMine's with my POKéMON, so they should\nbe okay, but...
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E405: Our sand castle's taking a long time\nto make.
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E446: We're going to get all the sand from\nthe beach and make a big castle!\pAnd then we're going to be a king and\nqueen.\pWe'll let you be a servant.
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E4D5:
The water around these parts is clean.\pBut, I get my ZIGZAGOON to pick up
litter from the shoreline at times.\pDirty water becomes rain and joins our
rivers, which we drink from...\pIf we pollute the sea, it all comes
back to haunt us eventually.
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E5DC: SEASHORE HOUSE\p“May hot battles rage on hot sands!\nThe place for hot TRAINERS!”
data_maps_Route109_text.inc.Route109_Text_16E62C: TRAINER TIPS\pPOKéMON at the same level may not\nalways have identical stats.\pPOKéMON raised by TRAINERS are said\nto grow stronger than wild POKéMON.
